title: styrax glabrescens var. glabrescens
intro: Styrax glabrescens var. glabrescens, also known as Korean styrax, is a plant species belonging to the family Styracaceae, native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its resinous sap. The health benefits of Korean styrax include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Korean styrax include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
